title: Heading to CMU 🎓
html: I will join Carnegie Mellon University as a Master's student in Electrical and Computer Engineering (ECE) starting Fall 2026.

title: EACL 2026 Acceptance
html: Our paper, BILLY: Steering Large Language Models via Merging Persona Vectors for Creative Generation, was accepted to EACL 2026 Oral.

title: New AI Engineer Role
html: Started my new role as an AI Engineer (Contractor) at LOGOLO.

title: ICLR 2025 Acceptance
html: Our paper, Dynamic-SUPERB Phase-2, was accepted to ICLR 2025.

title: AI Engineer at Genibuilder
html: Started my full-time position as an AI Engineer at Genibuilder.

title: AI Engineer Internship at Compal Electronics
html: Started my internship position as an AI Engineer at Compal.

title: COLM 2024 Acceptance
html: Our paper, LLM Discussion, was accepted to COLM 2024.

title: RLLab Research Position
html: Started a new undergraduate research position at the Robot Learning Laboratory (RLLab), NTU.

title: SPMLLab Research Position
html: Started a new undergraduate research position at the Speech Processing and Machine Learning Laboratory (SPMLLab), NTU.
